nodes.label: Pattern: Feature Gate — DB-Based Runtime Gate
nodes.norm_label: pattern: feature gate — db-based runtime gate

nodes.label: Rule: Every new state transition must include eventEmitter.emit(AGENT_EVENTS.STATUS_CHANGED, ...)
nodes.norm_label: rule: every new state transition must include eventemitter.emit(agent_events.status_changed, ...)

nodes.label: Rule: No gate in DB → default allow (backward compatible)
nodes.norm_label: rule: no gate in db → default allow (backward compatible)

nodes.label: Rule: Feature gate naming convention is agent:{type}
nodes.norm_label: rule: feature gate naming convention is agent:{type}

nodes.label: Rule: All ExecutionContext properties are readonly, Object.freeze applied
nodes.norm_label: rule: all executioncontext properties are readonly, object.freeze applied

nodes.label: Rule: deniedSkills UNION, allowedTools INTERSECTION, permissionMode last non-undefined wins
nodes.norm_label: rule: deniedskills union, allowedtools intersection, permissionmode last non-undefined wins

nodes.label: Rule: Fallback chain throws first adapter's error type (3-strike cascade compatible)
nodes.norm_label: rule: fallback chain throws first adapter's error type (3-strike cascade compatible)

nodes.label: Rule: Empty allowedTools → permissive default (all allow)
nodes.norm_label: rule: empty allowedtools → permissive default (all allow)

nodes.label: Rule: 3 consecutive failures → auto-pause with pauseReason consecutive_failures(N)
nodes.norm_label: rule: 3 consecutive failures → auto-pause with pausereason consecutive_failures(n)

nodes.label: Rule: Budget check applied in both heartbeat.service.ts:wakeAgent() and agent-registry.service.ts:run()
nodes.norm_label: rule: budget check applied in both heartbeat.service.ts:wakeagent() and agent-registry.service.ts:run()

nodes.label: Rule: Agents use psql $AGENT_DATABASE_URL (read-only role agent_reader)
nodes.norm_label: rule: agents use psql $agent_database_url (read-only role agent_reader)

nodes.label: Rule: Prompts loaded from agent-config/prompts/agents/{type}.md (git-tracked), DB holds file path only
nodes.norm_label: rule: prompts loaded from agent-config/prompts/agents/{type}.md (git-tracked), db holds file path only

nodes.label: Rule: Business data is NOT injected — agents query autonomously
nodes.norm_label: rule: business data is not injected — agents query autonomously

nodes.label: Rule: Operational params (company_id, task_id, dry_run) are {{key}} substituted
nodes.norm_label: rule: operational params (company_id, task_id, dry_run) are {{key}} substituted

nodes.label: Prohibit: Modifying budget check in only one place
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: modifying budget check in only one place

nodes.label: Prohibit: Adding agent type without Zod schema
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: adding agent type without zod schema

nodes.label: Prohibit: Not persisting workflow state to DB
nodes.norm_label: prohibit: not persisting workflow state to db

nodes.label: Rationale: Add new runtimes (HTTP, Python, etc.) by implementing an adapter only
nodes.norm_label: rationale: add new runtimes (http, python, etc.) by implementing an adapter only

nodes.label: Rationale: Agent state changes emit events for SSE delivery to frontend
nodes.norm_label: rationale: agent state changes emit events for sse delivery to frontend

nodes.label: Rationale: Manager orchestrates specialists with human-in-the-loop approval
nodes.norm_label: rationale: manager orchestrates specialists with human-in-the-loop approval

nodes.label: Rationale: Always query DB to guarantee real-time toggle (no caching)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: always query db to guarantee real-time toggle (no caching)

nodes.label: Rationale: Prevent accidental mutation across async execution paths
nodes.norm_label: rationale: prevent accidental mutation across async execution paths

nodes.label: Rationale: Recover from max_tokens truncation automatically
nodes.norm_label: rationale: recover from max_tokens truncation automatically

nodes.label: Rationale: Per-agent timer replacement is race-free (no syncTimers call)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: per-agent timer replacement is race-free (no synctimers call)

nodes.label: Rationale: 5-layer permission resolution separates concerns (delegation vs tool permission)
nodes.norm_label: rationale: 5-layer permission resolution separates concerns (delegation vs tool permission)

nodes.label: Rationale: Streaming enables early-stopping on diminishing returns and progress visibility
nodes.norm_label: rationale: streaming enables early-stopping on diminishing returns and progress visibility

nodes.label: Rationale: Fallback chain provides resilience across adapter failures
nodes.norm_label: rationale: fallback chain provides resilience across adapter failures

nodes.label: Rationale: Rule-based classification avoids LLM cost/latency in v1
nodes.norm_label: rationale: rule-based classification avoids llm cost/latency in v1

nodes.label: Rationale: Compressing old execution results saves storage
nodes.norm_label: rationale: compressing old execution results saves storage

nodes.label: Rationale: Layered context compression fits multi-turn context into token budget
nodes.norm_label: rationale: layered context compression fits multi-turn context into token budget
